statement.en: Linear Lengthening Intonation in Iwaidja: an expressive applying across space and time ALS

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a linguistic research paper (dated 2026, future-projected or preprint status) describing intonational phenomena in Iwaidja, an endangered Australian Aboriginal language. The claim about 'linear lengthening intonation' applying 'across space and time' is linguistically provisional—awaiting peer validation, corpus confirmation, and replication across speaker populations. The abstract is incomplete, preventing full evaluation of empirical claims.

ramanujanFormula.latex: \int_0^T f(t) \cdot e^{\lambda s} \, dt = \text{voice rising through time}
ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 時間と空間を越えて、声が指数的に上昇する何かの痕跡。

visualGlyph.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 100 100' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><defs><stop offset='0%' style='stop-color:#7c3aed;stop-opacity:1'/><stop offset='100%' style='stop-color:#00d4ff;stop-opacity:1'/></defs><polyline points='10,80 25,65 40,50 55,35 70,20 85,10' stroke='url(#grad)' stroke-width='3' fill='none' stroke-linecap='round'/><circle cx='10' cy='80' r='2' fill='#ec4899'/><circle cx='85' cy='10' r='3' fill='#00d4ff'/><text x='50' y='95' font-size='10' text-anchor='middle' fill='#7c3aed'>Iwaidja</text></svg>
visualGlyph.interpretation: 言語の輪郭が時間軸に沿って上昇し、過去から未来へ表現力が弧を描く。
